creator: me@svmhdvn.name
text:
Thanks for the patch, @Chris: please add LICENSE_FILE=${WRKSRC}/COPYING as well, since the distribution has a license file. After that, I'll set this bug to 'open' after validation.

Also, since this port is currently unmaintained, would you be willing to be the MAINTAINER of this port? If so, then please make that change in the patch. If not, I can maintain this port.
